programs.title: Besharam 1978
programs.desc: Digvijay Singh falsely implicates Mayor Ramchandra in a corruption case, which leads him to commit suicide. Years later, Ramchandra's son Ram Kumar returns to teach Digvijay a lesson.

programs.title: The Burning Train
programs.desc: An engineer's dream of making the perfect train is given hope when the company commissions his prototype. He hopes to make up for all this sacrifice with the train's triumphant inaugural journey. However an embittered fellow employee has other ideas.

programs.title: Chhoti Si Baat
programs.desc: Arun, a timid young man, falls in love with Prabha but is too afraid to share his feelings with her. Things take a turn when another man attempts to woo Prabha.

programs.title: Naalayak
programs.desc: Laxman has always been the black sheep of the family. He swindles his brother’s money to impress a girl.

programs.title: Aadmi Aur Insaan
programs.desc: Jai and Munish's friendship is ruined when both of them fall in love with the same girl, Meena. Things take a turn when Munish finds out Jai was involved in the case of a faulty railway bridge.

programs.title: Zamana
programs.desc: Ravi and Vinod's father is killed by a gangster for developing a photo that depicts a crime scene. Ravi, a criminal, and Vinod, a police officer, decide to exact revenge on their father's murderer.
